entities.name: Voice-to-Content Pipeline

entities.name: Content Library

entities.name: Tiger Parent in Your Head
entities.context: Internalized critical voice from upbringing that becomes self-directed, especially in Asian/immigrant communities

entities.name: Negative Self-Talk and Avoidance
entities.context: Pattern where job search stress exacerbates internal criticism and avoidance behavior

entities.name: Minimizing Self-Letdowns Over Perfection
entities.context: Reframe: goal is to reduce ways you let yourself down rather than chase perfection
